'''''Challenge'' 66''' was a roleplaying magazine from November of [[1992]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Disturbance in the Force (article)|Disturbance in the Force]]" and was written by [[Chris Hind]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
